name: Margery Daw
description: Height: 173cm (5'6") Margery is a tall, "well-endowed" and mature blond Flame Haze with a drinking habit. She uses the book Grimoire, which is the divine vessel through which Marchosias, to whom she is bound, expresses his will. Her main powers focus around chanting spells and turning into a werewolf. name: Mariko Nakasu
description: Nicknamed “Body Ko” for her usual, sultry appearance. She’s known for sleeping around, but admits she's tired of dating men who only want her for sex - Her real love is a childhood friend in Yokohama. She starts pursuing Yuusuke after a short-lived relationship with Tsutomu, and begins dating him, somewhat competing with Ayumi for his affection.

name: Mavis von Austien
nativeName: メーヴィスフォンオースティン
description: Mavis is a young knight part of the Crimson Vow and noble at birth. She decided to become a knight but her family strongly opposed her decision causing her to run away from home and attending the Hunter's Guild where she eventually joined the Crimson Vow. Mavis has a very dignified personality which really emphasizes her noble lineage. However, she has a hard time with sad and hard stories, often crying her eyes out.

name: Naoto Miura
description: Naoto is obsessed with clockwork and is often oblivious to his surroundings. Due to this, he is often bullied in school. Naoto prefers automata over humans as automata do not age. ~! He even called Marie a "flesh-bag" and refused her request to help her fix Kyoto's Core Tower. He only accepted after RyuZU told him that her younger sister (AnchoR) is located there. !~ He isn't the kind of person to be angered easily. name: Nazuna
description: __Height:__ 150 cm She lives in room 203. She has sandy blonde hair, braids, and large side bangs. She used to live in the neighborhood, but after entering Yamabuki Art High School her father was transferred somewhere for work and her mother followed with him. She appears very quiet and reserved, but has an inferiority complex. She is not in the art department.

name: Nursery Rhyme
description: Alice's Servant in Fate/EXTRA . Nursery Rhyme isn't an actual hero, but a general term for picture books. As they took on the dreams of many children, they formed into a concept and turned into a Servant. Its Noble Phantasm is a unique barrier called "Nursery Rhyme". It reflects the Master's heart and creates a Virtual-Servant in the form the Master dreamed of.

name: Primula
description: Height: 151cm Primula is a strange, soft-spoken girl that's often seen carrying a stuffed cat around. She came to the human world to search for Rin, who she had heard about from Nerine. ~!It is later discovered that she is the third in a series of artificial life forms created by a group of scientists from both the world of the Gods and the world of the Demons. name: Ranmaru  Kageyama
description: Ranmaru is a casual and easy-going boy. He is generally placid in nature, although occasionally flustered, such as when Sara holds his hand. He seems to come off as nervous or awkward in certain situations. Ranmaru also tries to keep quiet and distant until provoked. He thinks ahead before dealing with dangerous scenarios, showing his level-headedness and his good perception. He is shown to be compassionate and expresses a want to be useful to others. name: Rin Suzunoki
description: Her bike is a Suzuki GSX400S Katana. She loves all Suzuki bikes unconditionally.

name: Rina Ogata
description: Rina Ogata, another heroine, is a popular idol singer under the same management agency as Yuki. Rina is elegant and intelligent, and maintains a mutual friendship with Yuki. She has been often occupied with work since she was young, and becomes attracted to Tōya to compensate her loneliness.

name: Rinne Rokudou
description: A boy of mixed human and shinigami heritage residing in the human world, despite his grandmother's invitation to live with her. He used to live with his grandfather until he died and now lives in an abandoned club building of the school he attends. He performs the duties of a shinigami on behalf of his grandmother, though requires tools that a true shinigami would not need and that are quite inexpensive, often equating to ¥500 or ¥1,000.
